name: IndiGo IDFC FIRST Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under IndiGo IDFC FIRST Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Vouchers of 5,000 IndiGo BluChips at annual spending milestones of Rs 2 lakh, Rs 5 lakh, Rs 8 lakh, Rs 10 lakh and Rs 12 lakh
additionalBenefits: Dual credit card on Mastercard and RuPay networks
Earn up to 22 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100
Welcome benefits include voucher of 5,000 IndiGo BluChips plus 1 IndiGo meal voucher
Voucher of 3,000 IndiGo BluChips on spending Rs 1 lakh or more in first 90 days
Up to Rs 25,000 reimbursement per year for non-refundable flight and hotel cancellations

salaried: Eligibility is subject to IDFC FIRST Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to IDFC FIRST Bank approval criteria
